faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Mineola?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Mineola typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Mineola homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-6 hours for an average-sized home, with heat treatments often completed in a single day. Chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to ensure all bed bugs and eggs are eliminated.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Mineola?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. Heat treatments are chemical-free, while our EPA-approved pesticides are applied strategically with minimal exposure. We provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure your family's safety.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Mineola?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period following proper treatment protocol, we'll retreat your property at no additional charge. Our goal is complete elimination and your peace of mind.
